ui_copy.title: Google OAuth setup
ui_copy.description: Add your Google OAuth client details, then continue with Google to authorize this workspace.
ui_copy.last_checked_empty: Google connection has not been checked yet.

status_messages.draft: Add your Google OAuth client details to begin, then continue with Google.
status_messages.pending_oauth: Complete the Google sign-in flow in the browser to finish setup.
status_messages.connected: Google OAuth is complete. Use Check connection to verify the saved token before using this integration in workflows or API resources.
status_messages.needs_attention: Google needs attention. Check the connection or reconnect to repair the saved credentials.
status_messages.expired: The saved Google token has expired. Refresh it or reconnect Google to continue.
status_messages.revoked: Google access has been revoked. Reconnect Google to restore this integration.

ui_copy.title: Trello credential setup
ui_copy.description: Enter a Trello API key and token to save this connector for workspace use.
ui_copy.last_checked_empty: Trello connection has not been checked yet.

status_messages.draft: Add your Trello API key and token, then save the connector.
status_messages.pending_oauth: Trello uses saved API credentials instead of an OAuth browser callback.
status_messages.connected: Trello credentials are saved. Use Test connector to verify the API key and token before using this integration.
status_messages.needs_attention: Trello needs attention. Save a complete API key and token, then test the connector again.
status_messages.expired: The saved Trello token is no longer valid. Replace it and test the connector again.
status_messages.revoked: Trello credentials have been cleared. Save a new API key and token to restore this integration.
